DP.054.0000:
Um...
Who did you say I was again?\f
...
...\f
Oh, yes, I remember now!
I’m the Move Deleter!\f
DP.054.0001:
You’ve come to make me force your
Pokémon to forget some moves?
DP.054.0002: Which Pokémon should forget a move?\f
DP.054.0003:
Remember me if there are moves that
need to be forgotten.
DP.054.0004:
That Pokémon knows only one move,
so it can’t be forgotten...\f
DP.054.0005:
What? That’s an Egg.
No Egg should know any moves.\f
DP.054.0006:
OK, then.
Which move should be forgotten?\f
DP.054.0007:
Hm! The move [0106,0000]?
Should that move be forgotten?
DP.054.0008:
It worked perfectly!\f
Your Pokémon has forgotten the move
[0106,0000] completely.
